steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The answer must accurately describe the Amur grape data from the graph, giving specific counts for opposite-side and same-side leaf pair orientation to support the claim that one orientation dominates.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — ~150 opposite-side, ~60 same-side: Matches the graph values for Amur grape exactly. ✓
  • Choice B — ~150 opposite-side, ~49 same-side: Misreads the same-side bar; the graph shows ~60, not 49. ✗
  • Choice C — no same-side pairs: The graph clearly shows ~60 same-side pairs; this is factually wrong. ✗
  • Choice D — no same-side pairs: Same error as C. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
